customer_benefit: Low-cost basic chequing account for clients with minimal day-to-day banking needs, including a limited number of included debit or Interac e-Transfer transactions.
model_use: Recommend reviewing whether the client may benefit from a lower-cost basic account instead of a higher-fee package.

customer_benefit: Provides more included debit or Interac e-Transfer transactions than the Basic Banking Account while remaining below premium package pricing.
model_use: Flag clients who exceed Basic Banking activity but may not need unlimited transactions.

customer_benefit: Unlimited debit transactions and Interac e-Transfer transactions for everyday banking needs.
model_use: Recommend reviewing Preferred Package suitability for clients with high monthly transaction activity.

customer_benefit: Premium bundled package with unlimited transactions, selected ABM benefits, credit card annual fee rebate, MomentumPLUS interest rate boost, and other bundled banking benefits.
model_use: Flag high-value or multi-product clients who may benefit from bundled premium banking features.

customer_benefit: Monthly account fee may be waived if the client maintains the required minimum daily closing balance for the full statement period.
model_use: Recommend checking whether the client can maintain the required balance to avoid monthly account fees.

customer_benefit: Monthly account fee may be waived if the client maintains the required minimum daily closing balance for the full statement period.
model_use: Flag clients who may already qualify, or could qualify, for a Preferred Package fee waiver through balance maintenance.

customer_benefit: Monthly account fee may be waived or rebated when the client maintains the required balance in the Ultimate Package or eligible combined balance with MomentumPLUS Savings.
model_use: Recommend checking whether the client can structure balances to reduce or eliminate Ultimate Package monthly fees.

product_name: Basic Banking / Basic Plus / Preferred / Ultimate / selected savings accounts
customer_benefit: Clients aged 60 or older may receive a monthly account fee discount on eligible accounts.
model_use: Flag senior clients for advisor review if an eligible account fee discount may apply.

customer_benefit: RDSP beneficiaries may be eligible to have the Basic Banking Account monthly fee waived after providing required proof.
model_use: Flag possible Basic Banking Account fee waiver opportunity for advisor verification.

product_name: Preferred Package for Students and Youth
customer_benefit: Eligible youth clients and full-time students may receive the Preferred Package for Students and Youth with free monthly account fee and unlimited included debit transactions.
model_use: Recommend checking student/youth package eligibility for young or student clients.

product_name: Preferred Package for Students and Youth
customer_benefit: Student/youth package includes free paperless, paper statement, and paper statement with cheque image return options.
model_use: Flag student/youth clients who may benefit from free recordkeeping options.

customer_benefit: Interac e-Transfer transactions are free for eligible day-to-day banking packages, though they may still count toward included debit transaction limits for some accounts.
model_use: Recommend a package review for clients who frequently send Interac e-Transfers or incur related transaction fees.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package includes no transaction fee for International Money Transfers.
model_use: Flag clients with international transfer activity for potential Ultimate Package benefit review.

customer_benefit: Preferred Package includes one free non-Scotiabank Interac ABM cash withdrawal in Canada per month.
model_use: Recommend reviewing Preferred Package if the client occasionally uses non-Scotiabank ABMs.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package includes unlimited Scotiabank access-fee waivers for eligible non-Scotiabank ABM withdrawals in Canada and internationally.
model_use: Flag clients with frequent ABM access fees or travel-related withdrawals for Ultimate Package review.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package account holders who add overdraft protection may have overdraft protection fees waived, subject to approval; interest on overdrawn balances still applies.
model_use: Flag clients with overdraft protection fees for advisor review of Ultimate Package benefits and suitability.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package may include one book of personalized cheques per year for an account in good standing.
model_use: Flag clients who order cheques and may benefit from Ultimate Package cheque benefits.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package may include free Canadian and U.S. dollar drafts for accounts in good standing.
model_use: Flag clients who frequently purchase drafts for potential Ultimate Package benefit review.

customer_benefit: Preferred Package may provide a first-year annual fee rebate on one newly opened eligible Scotiabank credit card.
model_use: Recommend an advisor review for clients who may benefit from opening an eligible credit card with a first-year fee rebate.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package may provide an annual fee rebate of up to $150 each year on one eligible Scotiabank credit card, while account and card remain open and in good standing.
model_use: Flag Ultimate Package clients with eligible card annual fees for rebate validation.

product_name: Preferred Package / Ultimate Package + MomentumPLUS Savings
customer_benefit: Preferred and Ultimate Package clients may receive an additional interest rate boost on MomentumPLUS Savings Account balances.
model_use: Recommend checking whether the client can improve savings return through package-linked MomentumPLUS rate boost.

customer_benefit: Preferred Package clients may receive Preferred Package GIC rates on eligible long-term non-redeemable GICs.
model_use: Flag clients with GIC needs for advisor review of Preferred Package GIC rate eligibility.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package clients may receive Ultimate Package GIC rates on eligible long-term non-redeemable GICs.
model_use: Flag Ultimate Package clients with GIC balances or upcoming maturities for rate-benefit review.

product_name: Scotia U.S. Dollar Daily Interest Account
customer_benefit: Preferred, Ultimate, and Student/Youth Preferred Package clients may qualify for a monthly account fee waiver on one Scotia U.S. Dollar Daily Interest Account.
model_use: Recommend U.S. dollar account fee-waiver review for clients with USD activity.

product_name: Ultimate Package + Basic Plus Bank Account
customer_benefit: Ultimate Package primary account holder may qualify for a monthly fee waiver on one additional Basic Plus Bank Account.
model_use: Flag clients with multiple accounts for potential bundled fee-waiver review.

customer_benefit: Ultimate Package may include a safety deposit box annual fee waiver up to the value of a small box, subject to availability and eligibility.
model_use: Flag Ultimate Package clients with safety deposit box usage for fee-waiver validation.

customer_benefit: Preferred Package clients may receive buy-one-get-one-free eligible Scotia iTRADE mobile app trades, subject to limits and eligibility.
model_use: Flag Preferred Package clients with self-directed investing activity for iTRADE benefit review.

product_name: Preferred Package for Students and Youth + Scotia iTRADE
customer_benefit: Eligible Student and Youth package clients may receive commission waivers on eligible Scotia iTRADE trades, subject to limits and eligibility.
model_use: Flag student/youth clients with investing activity for iTRADE benefit review.

product_name: Preferred Package / Ultimate Package / Student and Youth Package
customer_benefit: Eligible packages may participate in the Scene+ program.
model_use: Flag clients who may value rewards-linked banking benefits.

customer_benefit: Bank The Rest Savings Program is available free across listed day-to-day banking packages and can support automatic savings behavior.
model_use: Recommend automatic savings feature for clients with frequent spending and low savings accumulation.

customer_benefit: Mobile cheque deposit is listed as free across day-to-day banking packages.
model_use: Flag clients who deposit cheques in branch and may benefit from mobile cheque deposit education.

customer_benefit: Scotia InfoAlerts are listed as free across day-to-day banking packages.
model_use: Recommend account-alert education for clients with overdraft risk, low-balance events, or fraud-prevention needs.

customer_benefit: Open transit debit transactions are free and do not count against the allotted number of free debit transactions for eligible account types.
model_use: Flag clients with transit spending for debit-card transit payment benefit education.

customer_benefit: Money Master Savings Account has no monthly fee and pays interest on the entire balance, with rates based on balance tier.
model_use: Recommend reviewing a basic savings account option for clients holding idle cash in chequing.

customer_benefit: Money Master Savings Account allows unlimited no-fee transfers to other Scotiabank accounts through eligible self-service channels.
model_use: Flag clients who frequently move money between Scotiabank accounts and may value flexible savings transfers.

customer_benefit: MomentumPLUS Savings allows clients to earn premium interest based on selected premium periods, with longer periods generally linked to different premium interest treatment.
model_use: Recommend MomentumPLUS review for clients with stable cash balances that may not need frequent withdrawals.

customer_benefit: Savings Accelerator Account offers interest rates based on account balance, with multiple rate tiers and the ability to hold the account in a registered plan.
model_use: Flag clients with larger savings balances or registered-plan savings needs for Savings Accelerator review.

product_name: Scotia U.S. Dollar Daily Interest Account
customer_benefit: A U.S. dollar account may help clients who travel to the U.S. often or make and receive U.S. dollar payments avoid converting every transaction to Canadian dollars.
model_use: Recommend U.S. dollar account review for clients with recurring U.S. dollar activity.

product_name: Scotia U.S. Dollar Daily Interest Account
customer_benefit: U.S. Dollar Daily Interest Account includes no fee for U.S. dollar drafts purchased from the account.
model_use: Flag clients who purchase U.S. dollar drafts for possible U.S. dollar account benefit review.
